findings.evidence: `rg -n "restrict_(zero|add|neg|sub|smul)" TauCeti/Analysis/Holder/Basic.lean` has no hits; the only restriction API is `restrict_apply` at lines 210-213.
findings.fix: Add `[simp]` lemmas such as `restrict_zero`, `restrict_add`, `restrict_neg`, `restrict_sub`, and `restrict_smul`, proved by `ext x; simp`.
findings.issue: `HolderMap.restrict` is exposed alongside `Zero`/`Add`/`Neg`/`Sub`/`SMul`, but there are no characteristic lemmas saying restriction commutes with these operations, so downstream domain-space algebra has to unfold or reprove the API each time.

summary: The algebraic carrier instances are now present, but the public restriction API is incomplete for the stated domain-space target.
